title: Management Buyouts: What was the average premium for management buyouts (MBOs) according...
summary: Identify the average premium paid for management buyouts based on empirical research findings.
prompt: What was the average premium for management buyouts (MBOs) according to Kaplan's study?

options.text: A proxy contest for board control
A formal tender offer to shareholders
Kaplan found that the average premium for MBOs was 42

solution: Kaplan found that the average premium for MBOs was 42.3% above the market price two months before the initial announcement.
